results.rendered_html:
avalagna a.
1 Clinging or adhering to, touching, in contact with; vipulataraniraṃtarāvalagna  Śi. 7. 71. 
2 Hanging down.
3 Placed contiguously, impressed.
— gnaḥ The waist.
